mapper.select: SELECT RE_ID, BD_ID, RE_CONTENT, RE_WRITER, PARENT_ID, RE_REGDATE, RE_DELYN FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE BD_ID = #{bdId} AND RE_DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY RE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMMENT ( BD_ID, RE_CONTENT, RE_WRITER, PARENT_ID, RE_REGDATE, RE_DELYN ) VALUES ( #{bdId}, #{reContent}, #{reWriter}, #{parentId}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMMENT SET RE_CONTENT = #{reContent}, RE_REGDATE = SYSDATE WHERE RE_ID = #{reId}
UPDATE TBL_COMMENT SET RE_DELYN = 'Y' WHERE RE_ID = #{reId} AND RE_WRITER = #{reWriter}
